case_title: M&M FINANCIAL CONSULTANTS LLC VS. SAURAV BHATTACHARYYA ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $684.95 FILED BY M&M FINANCIAL CONSULTANTS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BHATTACHARYYA, SAURAV ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-22-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE SEP-05-2023 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAIL TO DEFENDANT(PUJA DEORA)(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER NO MAIL RECEPTACLE UNABLE TO FORWARD)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $45. SERVED AUG-07-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BHATTACHARYYA, SAURAV
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) GAURAV MALHOTRA, OWNER/CPA FILED BY PLAINTIFF M&M FINANCIAL CONSULTANTS LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-28-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-28-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY. PLAINTIFF M&M FINANCIAL CONSULTANTS LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY GAURAV MALHOTRA (OWNER/CPA) VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM. DEFENDANTS SAURAV BHATTACHARYYA AND PUJA DEORA ARE PRESENT. COURT ALLOWED PLAINTIFF TODAY'S APPEARANCE BY ZOOM FOR TODAY'S HEARING WITH NO OBJECTION BY THE DEFENDANTS. PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT SAURAV BHATTACHARYYA IS UNTIMELY (4 DAYS UNTIMELY), SUBSTITUTE SERVICE IN SAN FRANCISCO IS REQUIRED TO BE SERVED 25 DAYS BEFORE THE COURT DATE. DEFENDANT BHATTACHARYYA WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-22-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-28-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF M & M FINANCIAL IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GAURAV MALHOTRA, OWNER & CPA. DEFENDANT SAURAV BHATTACHARYYA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT PUJA DEORA IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOFS OF SERVICE ARE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY M&M FINANCIAL CONSULTANTS LLC BHATTACHARYYA, SAURAV DEORA, PUJA

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF M&M FINANCIAL CONSULTANTS LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BHATTACHARYYA, SAURAV DEORA, PUJA $467.48 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $627.48 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BHATTACHARYYA, SAURAV DEORA, PUJA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $85. SERVED AUG-07-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DEORA, PUJA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-28-2023 - JUDGMENT.
